title: 世界杯门票低于Fable 5单次提示词花费
full_text:
There's a lot of talk about World Cup ticket prices.
Yet tickets for @USMNT's opening match cost less than we've seen Fable 5 "ultracode" spend on a single prompt, writing docs for a small internal repo.
The gap between the permanent underclass and the AGI class keeps getting https://t.co/errmbABSwb
